allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== DNS for tools.arivanandhan.in ==="; try { Resolve-DnsName tools.arivanandhan.in -Type CNAME -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object Name, NameHost, Type } catch { Write-Output "No CNAME / not resolving: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Write-Output "=== A record ==="; try { Resolve-DnsName tools.arivanandhan.in -Type A -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object Name, IPAddress, Type } catch { Write-Output "No A record" }; Write-Output "=== HTTP check ==="; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "https://tools.arivanandhan.in" -Method Head -TimeoutSec 15 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Not serving yet: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
